creator: vidar@karlsen.tech
text:
Created attachment 177253
shar file for the port

New port: dns/void-zones-tools

void-zones-tools prepare a list of void zones that can be readily fed into Unbound.
Void zones are the most straightforward way of blocking ad, tracking and other malware domains.

WWW: https://github.com/cyclaero/void-zones-tools
